phrases.intent_en: Where is the Milas airport bus counter?
phrases.cultural_note: Multiple private company counters exist with no central ticket hall. Counters and bay numbers change frequently.

phrases.intent_en: When is the last bus to İzmir?
phrases.cultural_note: İzmir buses are run by multiple private companies, each with their own schedule. No unified timetable exists.

phrases.intent_en: When is the last bus to İzmir?
phrases.cultural_note: Türkiye'de otogarlarda birden çok özel otobüs firması bulunur ve her birinin tarifesi değişiklik gösterebilir.

likely_response.translation_en: At quarter past nine in the evening.

responses.english: At quarter past nine in the evening.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I pay dolmuş driver?
phrases.cultural_note: Türkiye'de dolmuşlarda ödeme genellikle yolculuk sırasında şoföre nakit olarak yapılır.

likely_response.local: Araç içinde, şoföre elden nakit ödersiniz.
likely_response.translation_en: Inside the vehicle, you pay the driver in cash.

responses.english: Inside the vehicle, you pay the driver in cash.
responses.french: Araç içinde, şoföre elden nakit ödersiniz.

phrases.intent_en: Is there a passenger waiting lounge?
phrases.cultural_note: The otogar has separate intercity and local areas. Waiting facilities depend on individual bus companies.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Milas airport bus counter?
phrases.text_local: Milas-Bodrum Havalimanı otobüsünün bilet gişesi nerede?
phrases.cultural_note: Otogarda merkezi bir bilet holü yoktur; her firmanın kendi bölümü bulunur.

likely_response.translation_en: Across from you, it says Havaş.

responses.english: Across from you, it says Havaş.
